title: Cognitive decline caregiver discussion
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: Supports patient and collateral cognitive and functional history for cognitive decline and caregiver discussion; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers

treatment_and_management.text: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports monitoring, coordination and support planning for cognitive decline and caregiver discussion; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Reporter, relationship, changes, time course, function, behaviour, safety, caregiver strain, assessment, diagnosis and plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for cognitive decline and caregiver discussion.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
